name: fn_add_numbers
description: Add two numbers together and return their sum.

name: fn_subtract_numbers
description: Subtract the second number from the first and return the result.

name: fn_multiply_numbers
description: Multiply two numbers together and return the product.

name: fn_divide_numbers
description: Divide the first number by the second and return the result.

name: fn_get_square_root
description: Calculate the square root of a number.

name: fn_get_power
description: Raise a base number to the power of an exponent.

name: fn_get_absolute_value
description: Return the absolute value of a number.

name: fn_get_modulo
description: Return the remainder when dividing the first number by the second.

name: fn_greet
description: Generate a greeting message for a person by name.

name: fn_reverse_string
description: Reverse a string and return the reversed result.

name: fn_to_uppercase
description: Convert all characters in a string to uppercase.

name: fn_to_lowercase
description: Convert all characters in a string to lowercase.

name: fn_count_characters
description: Count the number of characters in a string.

name: fn_count_words
description: Count the number of words in a string.

name: fn_concatenate_strings
description: Join two strings together and return the combined result.

name: fn_repeat_string
description: Repeat a string a given number of times.

name: fn_trim_string
description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from a string.

name: fn_substitute_string_with_regex
description: Replace all occurrences matching a regex pattern in a string.

name: fn_check_palindrome
description: Check whether a given string reads the same forwards and backwards.

name: fn_check_string_contains
description: Check whether a string contains a given substring.

name: fn_check_starts_with
description: Check whether a string starts with a given prefix.

name: fn_check_ends_with
description: Check whether a string ends with a given suffix.

name: fn_check_is_even
description: Check whether a given number is even.

name: fn_check_is_positive
description: Check whether a given number is positive.

name: fn_check_is_prime
description: Check whether a given number is a prime number.

name: fn_compare_numbers
description: Check whether the first number is greater than the second.

name: fn_check_strings_equal
description: Check whether two strings are exactly equal.
